paperTitle: : A Vision-Language-Action Model Bridging Understanding and Generation to Actions
organization: Shanghai AI Lab / Harbin Institute of Technology Shenzhen

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 98.2 · libero object 97.8 · libero goal 95.4 · libero 10 91.3 | Table 2 | Notes: Standard LIBERO 4-suite evaluation. Pretrained version with OXE + task-specific post-training.

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: widowx vm 72.9 | Tasks: put carrot on plate vm 70.8 · put eggplant in yellow basket vm 66.7 · put spoon on towel vm 50 · stack green block on yellow block vm 50 | Table 3 | Notes: Standard SimplerEnv Bridge WidowX VM evaluation. Overall avg = (grasp+success averages)/2 per the paper's format, but widowx_vm is the average success.
